title: Dart Source
documentation:
## Purpose
Carries Dart source files used in Flutter applications, server-side programs, and general-purpose Dart packages. Dart combines a familiar C-style syntax with a sound type system and built-in async/await support.

## When to use
Use `media:dart;textable;code` when a pipeline node consumes or produces `.dart` source files — for example, a code generation step targeting Flutter widgets or a linter analyzing Dart business logic.

## Notes
Dart supports both ahead-of-time compilation (for native mobile/desktop targets) and just-in-time compilation (for development). The extensions `.dart` covers both library and application entry-point files. See also [Dart Source](https://capdag.com/browse/media:dart;textable;code).
